ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (width, height, depth) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., outdoor, indoor, commercial) */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the stock (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Last date when the stock was restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the product */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price if the product is on sale */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the price is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer for delivery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item in the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price of the item after discounts and taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
